title: Share provider retry backoff jitter
goal: Replace fixed provider retry sleeps with a shared capped exponential full-jitter backoff helper for initial provider paths.
completionConditions: Shared retry backoff helper computes capped exponential backoff and full-jitter delays.
Anthropic, OpenRouter/OpenAI-compatible, and OpenAI retry loops use the shared jittered helper instead of fixed 1s/2s/4s delays.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: Third issue #27 implementation slice. Keep small and avoid changing retry counts or broad limiter architecture.
